source_pr.title: plan: fix bug when push topn down.
source_pr.body:
When topn is pushed down to the cop task plan. It's ByItems should be deep copied so the column index won't be affected by the origin topn plan.
PTAL @hanfei1991 @lamxTyler @shenli

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t use index(idx) order by a desc limit 1").Check(testkit.Rows("3 1 3")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t use index(idx) order by a desc limit 1").Check(testkit.Rows("3 1 3")) (executor/executor_test.go)
